introSection: Rebel Coaster is a steel roller coaster owned by Chants Amusements.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster previously operated as the Python Loop at the Perth Royal Show. Around 2017, it was sold to Chants Amusements who renamed it Nitro Coaster. It has since been renamed Rebel Coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster has a single vertical loop.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content:
On 25 September 2022 at the Melbourne Royal Show, a 26-year-old woman was hit by a train after entering the ride area. She was believed to be attempting to retrieve her phone after dropping it during the ride.

She suffered multiple physical injuries, brain damage, and spent several weeks in a coma.

A WorkSafe investigation concluded in July 2024 and no further action was taken.

fullText:
Rebel Coaster is a steel roller coaster owned by Chants Amusements.

The coaster previously operated as the Python Loop at the Perth Royal Show. Around 2017, it was sold to Chants Amusements who renamed it Nitro Coaster. It has since been renamed Rebel Coaster.

The coaster has a single vertical loop.



On 25 September 2022 at the Melbourne Royal Show, a 26-year-old woman was hit by a train after entering the ride area. She was believed to be attempting to retrieve her phone after dropping it during the ride.

She suffered multiple physical injuries, brain damage, and spent several weeks in a coma.

A WorkSafe investigation concluded in July 2024 and no further action was taken.
